## Testing

- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Manual verification completed
- [ ] Live preview test plan above was executed end-to-end
- [ ] A board member or agent can reproduce the new behavior from these instructions

## Branch Protection Checklist

- [ ] Source branch is not `main` (feature/hotfix branch only)
- [ ] Target branch is `main`
- [ ] `PR CI` checks are passing
- [ ] At least one reviewer was requested
- [ ] Review feedback has been addressed
- [ ] All review conversations are resolved
